analyst.name: analyst
analyst.description: Entry-level deal team member. Access to public filings, research notes, press releases, and sector overviews.

vp.name: vp
vp.description: Vice President or Senior Associate. Access to internal deal memos, financial models, internal analyses, and internal email communications.

partner.name: partner
partner.description: Partner-level. Full access including board materials, LP updates, and final Investment Committee memoranda.
